title: Chapter 10
content:
Chapter 10

It wasn’t like I was addicted to strawberries. I didn’t like or dislike them. I just ate them. Nothing more, nothing less.

Yet right now, this little girl was making me addicted to strawberries. I couldn’t put a stop to my tongue. The more her juices flowed, the more I was becoming addicted to her.

Up and down, clockwise and counter-clockwise, side to side.

“Ahnn!!”

“Aheung!!!”

“Ahunnn!!!!”

Her moans kept ringing in my ears, and she kept on gushing down there. Finally, not being able to hold back, I wrapped my entire mouth around her tiny vagina and sucked lightly.

“AAAAHHHNNN!!!!” She screamed as a gush of wetness directly entered my mouth.

She came.

Her legs gave out, and she almost fell, but I caught her.

“Haa… Haaa… Haaaa….” She breathed in and out in exhaustion. I loved the small sounds coming out of her tiny body as she lay on my chest, her soft butt on my crotch which didn’t react in any way.

Soon after, my little sister passed out, still in my embrace. I couldn't even ask her whether she enjoyed it or not, but there was time for that.

For now, I closed my eyes and soaked in the warm water. Fun aside, I still had a lot to do.

My level was too low for me to go out there, and my mana was way too low to even cast a simple ‘Cleanse’ or ‘Heal’, let alone cast world-destructive spells.

‘I guess I have to visit the sewers again.’ I thought with a sigh and left the bathroom without putting any clothes on, on me or my sister.

I took her to her room, where my elder sister was also present. When she saw her little sister passed out, she worriedly asked, “What happened to her?”

“Nothing. I just gave her a massage and she fell asleep after that.” I replied.

“Oh, I see.” The elder sister replied as if my words made sense. Well, in the real world, I would have already been given the title of the greatest vile creature, but here, well, in one phrase, this was an amazing world so far.

~~

A new life, a new day.

I had my fun yesterday with the women in the house. Although I also wanted to play with them at dinner, with all of them at once, I didn’t.

The fact that I was impotent crushed me for the umpteenth time yesterday. Mental satisfaction was great and all, but physical pleasure was also a requirement of a man, and since I couldn’t do that, I was quite depressed last night.

Also, even though I had mana now, it was still not enough to examine my body from the inside. I needed to raise my intelligence for that, and for that, I needed to raise my level.

So, back to the sewers.

But first…

[Quest: Supple and Succulent (Repeatable)]

The reward of such a quest was only one EXP point, but the real reward of this quest was the satisfaction of watching that supple pillow wiggle when my hand would dig into the softness.

I went down to see Rayla busy in the kitchen. Yesterday, I felt mana from everyone in this house, and Rayla had most of the mana in this house. If counted by my system standards, then a whopping 5000 points of mana.

But the fact that we lived in such a small house meant that having that much mana wasn’t exactly an achievement.

Or maybe there was another story.

“Mother,” I called her from behind.

“Yes, sweetie.” She wasn’t startled, which meant she was already aware of my presence.

“Could you please raise your skirt?” I asked.

“Why, sweetie?” She asked, turning her head to me, a curious expression on her face.

Instead of giving a lengthy explanation of my excuse, I simply said, “Yesterday, when I hit it, it felt really good. I wanted to see if it would feel the same again or not.”

“Oh, I that so?” she asked and got back to work.

She then said while busy with her work, “Do what you have to do, sweetie. Mother is busy with work.”

An unhindered permission. I nodded in the satisfaction and raised her skirt from behind.

The soft, bubbly, milky white pillows appeared in my vision in all their majesty. With her legs closed, I could see the buns pressed together that was perfect for a tight ass job.

And the most wonderful part, no blemishes. Smooth and silky, even in this form. I was loving this world more and more.

Without further ado, I raised my hand and brought it down without applying much force. After all, today’s spank was different than yesterday’s spank.

Yesterday, my condition was barely alive. Today, my condition was of a prime human condition.

Pah!

As my hand collided with her ass, it sunk in that magnificent pillow.

The feeling itself was…

…Divine.

“Oww.” Rayla winced in pain, but it wasn’t like it was too much. Just like ten times, a slight pinch. Yep, it sounded just like that. Or my brain could have rationalized it that way.

Who knew?

“Be careful, sweetie, it stings and interferes with mother’s work,” Rayla complained with a slight frown on her face.

[Quest complete]

[EXP +1]

As much as I wanted to continue and make that crotch wet, I didn’t want to offend her any more than this. It was clear she didn’t enjoy this. I would have to train her for that.

“Yes, mother.” I said and backed away before I asked, “When can I go hunting, mother?”

“When I can be sure that you would not be injured.” She replied with a smile, her frown nowhere to be seen.

“And when will that be?” I asked.

“At least until the awakening ceremony, when we find out what kind of combatant you are. If you’re not suited for hunting like everyone else, then you will have to consider another profession.” Rayla explained.

I nodded at the reasonable reasoning and said, “Well, then, to pass the time, I will be going to the library.”

“Okay, sweetie,” She said before she got back to her work, cleaning the table.

I left the house, but instead of going to the library, I returned to the place I came to yesterday. Once there, I entered the sewer just like yesterday.

The foul smell of the sewer struck my nose, which made me involuntarily pinch it. I sighed and let go of my nose to let my nose get used to it.

This was necessary. I needed to have enough mana to at least be able to cast a low-level spell.

Not utility spells, of course, but attack spells. What good would [Cleanse] do to fight? At the very least, I needed [Fireball] or [Flameball] to be able to hold against low-level monsters.

I had an edge, but I also had a disadvantage thanks to the system. I could circulate mana in my body, but I couldn’t increase it like everyone else. Of course, mana came to me very easily thanks to just investing my stats in the intelligence stat while other have to bust their asses to just attract one point of mana.

They say that the world would always find a way to even the pace.

I can increase my mana effortlessly, but I couldn’t do it unless I had stat points to do so. While others couldn’t raise mana as effortlessly as I but they would have the advantage of progressing every day, while I would be dependent on raising my level.

Finally, after an hour of searching, I finally found the signs of some mice, eating away at a corpse. Now that I could feel mana, I could also sense a very minuscule amount of mana on the teeth and claws of the mice.

That would explain why they could injure me with them. They were designed to have such a skill.

It wasn’t long before they caught on to the smell of fresh meat, a.k.a. mine.

Squeak!

They squeaked and rushed at me. Unlike yesterday, I was barehanded, but it didn’t matter much. Barehanded was enough.

There were thirteen of them, or maybe fourteen. There were a lot, so I couldn’t count them accurately. Well, it wasn’t like it changed what I had to do.

I stomped on the one at the forefront and grabbed the other with my hand. I picked it up effortlessly and slammed it into the others.

Simultaneously, I stepped on another one and snuffed its life. I didn’t stop and plunged my hand through another’s body.

The scene was disgusting, to say the least. And if I had to add the matter of mice to it, it became a whole lot of new, disgusting. Nothing like simple disgusting.

However, one thing was more than any other. The smile on my face.

These weren’t F rank mice.

They were E rank ones.

The amount of EXP wasn’t just 10. It was a whopping 100.

Fucking amazing.
